nasb.text: In that day,’ declares the Lord of hosts, ‘every one of you will invite his neighbor to sit under his vine and under his fig tree.’ ”

esv.text: In that day, declares the Lord of hosts, every one of you will invite his neighbor to come under his vine and under his fig tree.”

cnv.text: 到那日，你們各人要邀請自己的鄰舍來，坐在葡萄樹下和無花果樹下。’”

ccb.text: 到那天，你们将各自邀请邻居坐在葡萄树和无花果树下。这是万军之耶和华说的。’”
